pages.text: 清明节到啦！爸爸说：“今天我们去一个好玩的地方！”咘咘坐在车后座，小脚丫兴奋地踢来踢去：“去哪里去哪里？”NOMI 偷偷笑：“到了就知道啦！”
pages.text_en: It was Qingming Festival! Daddy said, "Let's go somewhere fun today!" Bubu sat in the back seat, kicking her little feet excitedly. "Where are we going?" NOMI giggled. "You'll see when we get there!"

pages.text: 到啦！好大好大的一片田！绿油油的叶子铺满了地面。咘咘左看看右看看：“可是……草莓在哪里呀？我没看到草莓树呀！”爸爸蹲下来笑着说：“草莓不长在树上哦！”
pages.text_en: They arrived! A huge field of green leaves stretched out everywhere. Bubu looked left and right. "But... where are the strawberries? I don't see any strawberry trees!" Daddy knelt down and laughed. "Strawberries don't grow on trees!"

pages.text: 爸爸轻轻翻开绿色的叶子——哇！下面藏着一颗红红的大草莓！咘咘瞪大眼睛：“草莓长在地上的呀！”NONO 飞低低地看：“对呀！草莓喜欢贴着地面晒太阳呢！”
pages.text_en: Daddy gently lifted some green leaves — wow! Hiding underneath was a big red strawberry! Bubu's eyes went wide. "Strawberries grow on the ground!" NONO flew down low to look. "That's right! Strawberries love sunbathing close to the ground!"

pages.text: 妈妈指着草莓说：“看！红红的草莓成熟了，可以摘。绿绿的还是小宝宝，要再晒几天太阳才能变红哦。”咘咘点点头：“绿色的等一等，红色的摘回家！”
pages.text_en: Mommy pointed at the strawberries. "See? Red ones are ripe and ready to pick. Green ones are still babies — they need a few more days of sunshine to turn red." Bubu nodded. "Green ones wait, red ones come home!"

pages.text: NOMI 教咘咘：“摘草莓要轻轻的哦！两根手指捏住这里，轻轻一转——啪！就下来了！”咘咘学着 NOMI 的样子，小心翼翼地——啪！“我摘到了！我摘到了！”
pages.text_en: NOMI showed Bubu. "Pick gently! Hold here with two fingers, give a gentle twist — pop! Off it comes!" Bubu carefully copied — pop! "I got one! I got one!"

pages.text: 一颗、两颗、三颗……咘咘的小篮子越来越满！红红的草莓堆在一起，好漂亮好漂亮。“爸爸快看！我摘了好多好多！”爸爸竖起大拇指：“咘咘真厉害！”
pages.text_en: One, two, three... Bubu's little basket got fuller and fuller! Red strawberries piled up together, so pretty! "Daddy look! I picked so many!" Daddy gave a thumbs up. "Great job, Bubu!"

pages.text: 妈妈洗了一颗草莓递给咘咘：“尝尝看！”咘咘咬了一大口——“哇！好甜好甜！”比在家里吃的还要甜！NOMI 说：“自己摘的果实，吃起来特别特别甜哦！”
pages.text_en: Mommy washed a strawberry and handed it to Bubu. "Try it!" Bubu took a big bite — "Wow! So sweet!" Even sweeter than the ones at home! NOMI said, "Fruit you pick yourself always tastes extra special!"

pages.text: 走呀走，咘咘发现了另一片地——“这是什么？圆圆的！”妈妈笑着说：“这是番茄哦！”有红的、绿的、还有黄的！咘咘伸手摘了一个红番茄：“番茄跟草莓不一样，它长在枝头上！”
pages.text_en: Walking on, Bubu found another patch. "What's this? It's round!" Mommy laughed. "Those are tomatoes!" There were red ones, green ones, and yellow ones! Bubu picked a red tomato. "Tomatoes are different from strawberries — they grow on the vine!"

pages.text: 咘咘的小篮子装得满满的——红草莓、红番茄、还有一颗黄番茄！妈妈帮咘咘擦擦脸上的汗：“今天的小农夫好棒！”一家人站在田边，笑着拍了一张照片。
pages.text_en: Bubu's basket was packed — red strawberries, red tomatoes, and a yellow tomato! Mommy wiped the sweat from Bubu's face. "What a great little farmer today!" The whole family smiled for a photo by the field.

pages.text: 回家的车上，咘咘抱着自己的小篮子，眼睛慢慢闭上了……小嘴角还带着笑，手指上还有红红的草莓汁。NOMI 轻轻给她盖上小毯子：“今天的小农夫累了。”
pages.text_en: In the car home, Bubu held her basket, eyes slowly closing... A little smile on her lips, strawberry juice still on her fingers. NOMI gently covered her with a blanket. "Our little farmer is tired."

pages.text: 今天咘咘学到了好多好多！草莓长在地上，不是树上。红色的熟了可以摘，绿色的要再等等。摘的时候轻轻转，不能使劲拉。自己摘的果实，吃起来最甜最甜！咘咘说：“下次还要来！”
pages.text_en: Today Bubu learned so much! Strawberries grow on the ground, not on trees. Red ones are ripe, green ones need more time. Pick with a gentle twist, don't pull hard. And fruit you pick yourself tastes the sweetest! Bubu said, "I want to come again next time!"
